final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: commercial food photography, fine-dining editorial
Primary request: meticulously plated French main course — sous-vide duck breast with black truffle sauce, sliced to reveal perfect rose-pink gradient interior, golden crispy skin with visible texture
Scene/backdrop: dark marble tabletop, blurred background suggesting Michelin-starred restaurant ambiance
Subject: duck breast slices arranged on celery root purée base, garnished with micro herbs, edible flowers, and drops of reduced red wine sauce; white matte bone china plate; silver cutlery; Burgundy wine glass with wine stains on inner wall
Style/medium: high-end commercial food photography, fine-dining editorial
Composition/framing: top-down 3/4 angle, shallow depth of field, focus on duck breast cross-section
Lighting/mood: side-backlight (rim light) emphasizing texture and gloss, moody and luxurious atmosphere
Color palette: deep burgundy wine + rose-pink duck + golden crispy skin + white bone china + dark marble + green micro herbs
Materials/textures: crispy duck skin with visible pores, velvety celery purée, matte porcelain, polished silver, liquid wine stains
Constraints: preserve the rose-pink gradient of duck breast, keep skin texture crisp and golden, maintain wine stains on glass interior
Avoid: overcooked gray meat, plastic-looking food, flat lighting, oversaturated colors, watermark
